name: Shrimp Tempura
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, leaving the tails on. Split each shrimp neatly down the back and spread open to form a butterfly shape.
2. Pat shrimp dry with paper towels.
3. In a bowl, stir together flour and salt.
4. Beat eggs and milk together until combined.
5. Add the egg mixture into the flour mixture and beat until well combined.
6. Heat peanut oil in a wok or fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Dip shrimp into batter, shaking off excess, and fry in hot oil, turning once, until brown, about 3 to 5 minutes.
